name: Green Diodebot
tips: Green Diodebot tutors Blue Diodebot on play. At 13/15 it's the tankiest of the three Diodebots — best for holding a lane.
The tutor chain guarantees hand refill. Play Green, get Blue in hand, play Blue next turn, get Red, and so on.
Green's 15 health lets it survive most early trades. Use it as a front-line body while building toward White Lasercannon.

Each tutored Diodebot is a Robot in hand for Lasercannon's discard cost. Hold Blue instead of playing it — pair it with another Robot you draw (or a later tutored Red) to bank the two discards Lasercannon needs.
If you need to stall for mana, Green Diodebot's durability buys time while its tutor keeps your hand full.
rulings: Summon: Tutor searches the caster's deck for Blue Diodebot. The picker modal shows every Blue in deck as a match; the caster MUST pick one to add to hand (TUTOR_SELECT) — declining is only possible when zero matches exist. If the caster's hand is already full (10 cards), the tutored card is exhausted (sent to the Exhaust Pile revealed) instead of entering hand — the pick still happens.
If no Blue Diodebot is in deck, the tutor silently no-ops.
Robots tutored from the deck count as Robots in hand for White Lasercannon's discard_cost_tribe check.
